---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new check or feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a security gap you've seen?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the check or feature you'd like to see.

## Severity / Impact

If this is a new security check, what severity would it have?

- [ ] CRITICAL — Direct fund loss risk
- [ ] HIGH — Significant security weakness
- [ ] MEDIUM — Suboptimal configuration
- [ ] LOW — Minor hardening opportunity
- [ ] INFO — Informational

## Additional Context

Any references, CVEs, incident reports, or documentation that motivate this request.
